reasoning_summary: Intel Linux/Android Kernel Engineer (entry-level / new grad). Explicitly designed for fresh graduates — "Are you a graduate... designed for graduates ready to launch their careers." Min qual: BS/MS in CS/CE + 3 months experience (internships/academic count). Folsom CA. Strong systems/kernel role — excellent for Linux, embedded systems, OS fundamentals background. No immigration sponsorship. Unique opportunity in professional kernel dev at Intel SoC platform team.
title: Linux Kernel Engineer
